pi_items.source: Web search confirms Longyearbyen, Svalbard is located at approximately 78.22° N latitude, and verifier.py enforces a TARGET_LAT_RAD of 1.365 (~78.22°)
Web search confirms Longyearbyen, Svalbard is located at approximately 15.62° E longitude, and verifier.py enforces a TARGET_LON_RAD of 0.272 (~15.62°)
verifier.py checks for these exact flag values to award points, matching task description requirements
export_result.sh specifically reads this file path to check for required keywords
export_result.sh checks this directory for new screenshots
verifier.py explicitly requires ss_count >= 5 to award full points for screenshots

privileged_info_summary: The task correctly requires the agent to configure Stellarium for Longyearbyen, Svalbard, with coordinates verified as ~78.22° N (1.365 rad) and ~15.62° E (0.272 rad). The display settings must strictly have the atmosphere disabled, and the landscape, azimuthal grid, and cardinal points enabled, as confirmed by verifier logic. The output must include at least 5 screenshots saved to /home/ga/Pictures/stellarium/ and an educational summary at /home/ga/Desktop/arctic_lesson_plan.txt mentioning Longyearbyen and horizon observations.
